history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A street scene shows two people parked on scooters beneath tall palm trees in daylight.

Main Subject:
Two people are seated on or straddling scooters at the edge of a paved roadway. Each person wears a black full-face helmet, a dark short-sleeve top, and light-colored sandals or slides, with their hands positioned on the scooter handlebars.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors on a street with a curb and road markings. The background is filled with dense green palm trees and other foliage, and the sky appears bright and overcast or lightly hazy. A tall utility pole with cables runs upward near the center-right, and a small sign or board is visible mounted on it.

Visual Details:
The camera angle is low to mid-height, looking slightly upward toward the helmets and the tops of the palm trees. The scooters are white and glossy. The left scooter has a rounded front and a dark windshield area, while the right scooter has a more angular front fairing with a visible red panel at the lower front. The lighting is diffuse daylight, creating soft shadows on the pavement. The people are centered in the lower half of the image, while the palm canopy dominates the upper half. The composition is framed so the tall trees and the pole create vertical lines behind the scooters.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows two helmeted people sitting on scooters on a street. Dense palm trees and a utility pole fill the background under bright daylight.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No readable text is visible in the screenshot (aside from the phone status bar).

# Structured Version

- **Status bar (time/indicators):**
  - `20.39`
  - Indicators: `[unclear icons]`  
  - Battery: `29%`

# Notes

- The icons in the status bar are not clearly distinguishable; only the time `20.39` and battery `29%` are clearly readable.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

Two individuals wearing black helmets and casual clothing are seated on their respective scooters on a paved road. The scooter on the left is a light grey Vespa, while the one on the right is a white and red Yamaha sport scooter. Both scooters have their headlights on. The riders are positioned side-by-side, facing forward, with their legs extended. The background features lush green trees, including palm trees and other foliage, and a cloudy sky. A blue sign with a white fuel pump icon is visible on the right side of the image. The lighting suggests it might be late afternoon or early evening, with a soft, diffused light. The overall mood is casual and urban, with a focus on the two scooters and their riders. The color palette is dominated by greens from the trees, the grey of the Vespa, and the white and red of the Yamaha, contrasted with the dark clothing of the riders and the grey sky.
